# Stock Restrict Lot

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:6ffc425e1978c4869c620a05c974b9287945e8ce528d34a727679d752ff28ef7
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module add a field to restrict a stock move to a specific lot.
It propagates it between chained moves. A move with a restrict lot will only be able to
reserve or transfer products with the specified lot.
This module is a based for other modules, it has not effect on its own.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_restrict_lot.models.product_product.ProductProduct._get_domain_locations
documentation: To be able to get the outgoing and incoming qty by the restrict_lot_id
the odoo standard method _compute_quantities_dict is hookable
therefore the domain is already here changed

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_restrict_lot.models.stock_move.StockMove._check_lot_consistent_with_restriction
documentation:
Check that the lot set on move lines
is the same as the restricted lot set on the move

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_restrict_lot.tests.test_restrict_lot.TestRestrictLot.test_move_validation_inconsistent_lot
documentation:
Check that an error is raised when performing a move _action_done()
if the lot restriction on the move is inconsistent with the
lot in the move line
